violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Ice scoop for the back room ice machine is stored on a cloth on top of the ice machine. Advise storing in a cleanable container.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Red/white single-use boats and to-go containers are stored upright under the kitchen monitor and wire rack. Advise flipping these upside down to prevent contamination.
